entities.name: Atomic operations
entities.context: Principle of performing move operations instead of copy+delete for safety

entities.name: Idempotency
entities.context: Principle ensuring operations check destination existence and skip duplicates

entities.name: Resumability
entities.context: Principle allowing safe retry if operations fail

entities.name: [P] suffix
entities.context: Indicator marking folders as ready to place

entities.name: Registry
entities.context: Central meeting database updated during cleanup

entities.name: Inbox
entities.context: Location where folders remain if move fails

entities.name: scheduled task
entities.context: Hourly execution mechanism for the prompt

relationships.context: Both are operational safety principles in the system
Suffix enables tracking of ready-to-place state for safe retries
Registry tracks meetings processed from Inbox
